solution:
```
class Solution:
    def findNthDigit(self, n: int) -> int:
        length, count, start = 1, 9, 1
        while n > length * count:
            n -= length * count
            length += 1
            count *= 10
            start *= 10
        start += (n - 1) // length
        s = str(start)
        return int(s[(n - 1) % length])
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(log n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses mathematical calculations to determine the number and digit position, then converts the number to a string to access the desired digit.
